name: Butrint National Park
description: UNESCO World Heritage site featuring ancient Greek and Roman ruins. The best-preserved archaeological site in Albania.

name: Porto Palermo Castle
description: A stunning 19th-century star-shaped castle built by Ali Pasha Tepelena, overlooking the turquoise bay.

name: Gjipe Beach & Canyon
description: Hidden paradise reachable only by boat or a 30-minute hike. Surrounded by massive canyon walls.

name: The Blue Eye (Syri i Kaltër)
description: A crystal-clear natural water spring nearly 50 meters deep. Famous for its deep blue color and freezing water.

name: Llogara Pass Viewpoint
description: Breathtaking panoramic views of the entire Ionian coast from 1,000 meters above sea level.
